events.name: FC Augsburg at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Harry Kane scored a hat-trick as champions Bayern Munich celebrated lifting the Bundesliga trophy with a 5-1 win over Cologne at the Allianz Arena.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane nets hat trick as Bayern rout Cologne

video.headline: Bayern Munich vs. FC Cologne - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayern Munich vs. FC Cologne - Game Highlights) 2026/05/16 ESHEET

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! 1. FC Heidenheim 1846 0, 1. FSV Mainz 05 1. Phillip Tietz (1. FSV Mainz 05) header from very close range to the bottom right corner.

Goal! 1. FC Heidenheim 1846 0, 1. FSV Mainz 05 2. Nadiem Amiri (1. FSV Mainz 05) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Phillip Tietz following a fast break.
First Half ends, 1. FC Heidenheim 1846 0, 1. FSV Mainz 05 2.
Substitution, 1. FC Heidenheim 1846. Christian Conteh replaces Marvin Pieringer.
Substitution, 1. FC Heidenheim 1846. Omar Haktab Traoré replaces Marnon Busch.
Substitution, 1. FSV Mainz 05. Danny da Costa replaces Stefan Posch.
Substitution, 1. FC Heidenheim 1846. Stefan Schimmer replaces Arijon Ibrahimovic.
Substitution, 1. FSV Mainz 05. Lee Jae-Sung replaces Nadiem Amiri.
Substitution, 1. FSV Mainz 05. Anthony Caci replaces Silvan Widmer.
Eren Dinkçi (1. FC Heidenheim 1846) is shown the yellow card.
Sheraldo Becker (1. FSV Mainz 05) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, 1. FC Heidenheim 1846. Mathias Honsak replaces Eren Dinkçi.
Substitution, 1. FC Heidenheim 1846. Adrian Beck replaces Niklas Dorsch.
Substitution, 1. FSV Mainz 05. Lennard Maloney replaces Sheraldo Becker.
Substitution, 1. FSV Mainz 05. Nelson Weiper replaces Phillip Tietz because of an injury.

keyEvents.text: Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 1, FC Augsburg 0. Andrej Ilic (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by András Schäfer following a fast break.
Oliver Burke (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card.
Christopher Trimmel (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 2, FC Augsburg 0. Andrej Ilic (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from outside the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Oliver Burke with a headed pass.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 3, FC Augsburg 0. András Schäfer (1. FC Union Berlin) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Livan Burcu following a corner.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Han-Noah Massengo replaces Yannik Keitel.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Rodrigo Ribeiro replaces Mert Kömür.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Mads Pedersen replaces Marius Wolf.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Noahkai Banks replaces Chrislain Matsima.
Han-Noah Massengo (FC Augsburg) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Josip Juranovic replaces Christopher Trimmel.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Woo-yeong Jeong replaces Ilyas Ansah.
Aljoscha Kemlein (1. FC Union Berlin) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Tim Skarke replaces Livan Burcu.
Substitution, FC Augsburg. Uchenna Ogundu replaces Michael Gregoritsch.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Leopold Querfeld replaces Oliver Burke.
Substitution, 1. FC Union Berlin. Dmytro Bogdanov replaces Andrej Ilic.
Goal! 1. FC Union Berlin 4, FC Augsburg 0. Woo-yeong Jeong (1. FC Union Berlin) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal following a fast break.
